title: Poor Little Heart!
content:
Poor little heart!
    Did they forget thee?
    Then dinna care! Then dinna care!

    Proud little heart!
    Did they forsake thee?
    Be debonair! Be debonair!

    Frail little heart!
    I would not break thee:
    Could'st credit me? Could'st credit me?

    Gay little heart!
    Like morning glory
    Thou'll wilted be; thou'll wilted be!
meaning:
Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Poor Little Heart!"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
